ValidationRule.description: #DimensionStory - Dimension value "inactive " field should not be allowed to be unchecked if it's a standard dimension and none of the standard dimension look up were filled.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Inactive__c) && !leaseworks__Inactive__c && leaseworks__Dimension__r.leaseworks__Is_Standard__c && ISBLANK(leaseworks__Asset__c) && ISBLANK(leaseworks__Entity__c) && ISBLANK(leaseworks__Lease__c) && ISBLANK(leaseworks__Operator_New__c) && ISBLANK(leaseworks__Bank_Account__c)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The underlying record for this dimension value no longer exists. Please recreate the record to activate the dimension value.
